name: Pickled Jalapenos
recipeIngredient: One head of cauliflower, cut into small pieces
White vinegar (enough to fill 8 pint jars)
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice carrots into rounds.
2. Cut cauliflower into small pieces and onions into chunks.
3. Halve garlic cloves lengthwise.
4. Heat a little oil in a large pot, then add all vegetables and cook until lightly coated with oil.
5. Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
6. Add bay leaves, cloves, pepper corns, cinnamon stick, and mustard seeds to jars.
7. Add salt to each jar.
8. Pack the cooked vegetables into jars, leaving about 1 inch of headspace.
9. Pour white vinegar over the vegetables in each jar until completely covered.
10. Seal jars tightly and let cool to room temperature.
11. Refrigerate for at least one week before consuming.
